economic_notes: Shawanaga First Nation holds a 33.333% interest in Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (modified equity). Multiple Feed-in-Tariff solar partnerships held at nil value. Gas station operations reported under Other segment. Casino Rama revenue received. Henvey Inlet Transmission revenues noted.
notes: Audit was QUALIFIED on three grounds: (1) inability to observe or verify inventory quantities at year-end; (2) inability to confirm payroll expenses were properly recorded; (3) inability to confirm completeness and existence of gas sales for April 1 2021 to January 31 2022 due to new gas station opening in February 2022 with no prior tracking system. Fiscal year 2022 financial statements were signed September 26 2024 — over two years after year-end. Major capital expansion: tangible capital assets grew from ~$6.1M to ~$15.9M driven by $10.7M in additions, largely financed by $10.6M in new First Nations Finance Authority debt. Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership is the sole GBE accounted for on modified equity basis at 33.33%. Multiple Feed-in-Tariff solar partnerships carried at nil. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council or staff included in the document. Community operations segment includes housing-related expenses but not separately broken out. Gas Sales revenue is contained within the Other segment.
